monthly-addons.name: Monthly Add-Ons
monthly-addons.description: Recurring services that stack on any package.

services.name: Social Media Management
services.outcome: Posting, scheduling, community engagement, comments, and DMs. Built into Growth Machine and Growth Partner. Add it to Content Presence or Content Growth.
deliverables: $500 / mo: 1 platform, scheduled posting, basic engagement
$1,000 / mo: 2 platforms, active posting, comments and DMs
$1,500 / mo: 3 platforms, full community management, trend monitoring

services.name: Ad Campaign Management
services.outcome: Meta, Google, and TikTok ad creative, launch, and optimization. Priced on platforms and ad budget. Ad spend billed separately.

services.name: Ongoing PR Retainer
services.outcome: 1 to 2 press releases per month plus active media outreach and relationship building. Local, regional, and national targeting.

specialty-projects.name: Specialty Projects
specialty-projects.description: One-off projects and standalone productions. Stack on any package or book solo.

services.name: Website Build / Redesign
services.outcome: Custom design, build, and launch. Mobile-first, SEO-ready, conversion-optimized.

services.name: Single Press Release
services.outcome: Written, formatted, and distributed to news outlets. Pick your reach.

services.name: Photo Mini Session
services.outcome: 20 to 30 edited photos delivered in 48 to 72 hours. Products, staff, venue, menu items.

services.name: UGC View Boosts
services.outcome: Guaranteed local views from our Gulf Coast creator network. Pay per boost, stack as needed.
